sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (DEPTLEVEL = 1 OR CN = 'Top') ) A

SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME, CLOSED_DAY, ATTITUDE_MOD_APPL, CLOSED_DATE_ATTITUDE, date_format(CONF_SET_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CONF_SET_DATE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF SET WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime#, CLOSED_DAY = #closedDay#, ATTITUDE_MOD_APPL = #attitudeModAppl#, CLOSED_DATE_ATTITUDE = #closedDateAttitude#, CONF_SET_DATE = str_to_date(#confSetDate#, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.USER_ID, SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')),' ' ,A.WORK_STARTTIME), INTERVAL #offsetMin# hour), 12, 5) as WORK_STARTTIME, SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')),' ' ,A.WORK_ENDTIME), INTERVAL #offsetMin# hour), 12, 5) as WORK_ENDTIME, B.TITLE, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DESCRIPTION FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf A INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster B ON A.USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
B.DESCRIPTION like CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
B.DISPLAYNAME like CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
ORDER BY $order$
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf A INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster B ON A.USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
B.DESCRIPTION like CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
B.DISPLAYNAME like CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')

SELECT TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, ISUSE, IFNULL(IMG_PATH,'') AS IMG_PATH, IFNULL(PARENT_ID,'') AS PARENT_ID, FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
ISUSE = #isuse#
<!-- PARENT_ID = 'A05' --> <!-- -->
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET ISUSE = #isuse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, ISUSE, IFNULL(IMG_PATH,'') AS IMG_PATH, IFNULL(PARENT_ID,'') AS PARENT_ID, FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
SELECT MAX(cast(substring(TYPE_ID,2) as unsigned)) + 1 AS MAXTYPEID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FORM_ID, TENANT_ID, FORM_NAME, FORM_NAME2, FORM_HTML FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET TYPE_NAME = #typeName#, TYPE_NAME2 = #typeName2#, IMG_PATH = #imgPath# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE (TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, IMG_PATH, PARENT_ID, FORM_ID) VALUES (#typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, #imgPath#, 'A05', #formId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.USER_ID, A.WORK_STARTTIME, A.WORK_ENDTIME, B.DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.USER_ID = #userId#
